name: Xuance

skills.name: Crazed Prelude
skills.description: Deals extra damage to enemies at long range and slows them, while gaining a Movement Speed boost.

skills.name: Flailing Sickles
skills.description: Dashes in the target direction, pulling enemies marked by his sickle a certain distance. Also enhances his next Basic Attack.

skills.name: Nightmare Hooks
skills.description: Charges up and gains Movement Speed. After charging, he throws the sickle to immobilize enemies and deal damage, marking the first enemy hit. Using the skill again will pull back and damage the marked enemy.

skills.name: Crimson Blur
skills.description: Dashes behind a target marked by his sickle, dealing damage. Beyond a certain range, he moves toward the target instead. If he has not marked a target, the hook latches onto one, dealing damage. Takes 50% less damage during the dash. Passive: Kills and assists grant Movement Speed and Attack Speed, up to 3 stacks.

tips: Xuance is a Medium Assassin (Jungling) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 52.3% win rate and 0.2% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Rapacious Bite → Boots of Dexterity → Axe of Torment → Master Sword → Bloodweeper → Shadow Ripper.
Run Red for stats that match Xuance's Assassin kit. Take Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Flailing Sickles → Nightmare Hooks → Crimson Blur → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.
Laning: Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.
Teamfight: Wait for CC from your team, then dive carry with full combo. Exit with reset or flash if focus fired.
Xuance excels into Lapulapu, Ata, Sakeer. Avoid blind picking into Daji, Diaochan, Gao without team peel.

Xuance sits at Tier B globally (52.3% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Low pick rate 0.2% — niche in high rank; surprise value if you perfect the kit. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.

faqs.question: Is Xuance good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Xuance is Tier B Assassin with 52.3% win rate, 0.2% pick rate, and 0.0% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Niche — draft carefully.

faqs.question: What is the best Xuance build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Rapacious Bite, Boots of Dexterity, Axe of Torment, Master Sword, Bloodweeper, Shadow Ripper. Run Red arcana with Smite. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Xuance?
faqs.answer: Pick Daji, Diaochan, Gao into Xuance. Deny Jungling resources early and force fights before Xuance completes core items. Xuance struggles when the enemy can peel and group them.

faqs.question: Who does Xuance counter?
faqs.answer: Xuance is strong into Lapulapu, Ata, Sakeer according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Xuance when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Jungling lane.

faqs.question: Is Xuance good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Xuance sits at Tier B globally (52.3% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Low pick rate 0.2% — niche in high rank; surprise value if you perfect the kit. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.

faqs.question: What lane should Xuance play?
faqs.answer: Xuance is tagged Jungling in Camp export (Assassin). Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Xuance?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Red arcana. Battle spell: Smite. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Xuance or Wukong — which is better?
faqs.answer: Xuance vs Wukong (Assassin, Tier S): Wukong is 1.3% pick / 49.7% WR. Xuance has +2.6% WR vs Wukong in Camp data. Choose Xuance when you need Jungling identity; choose Wukong for Jungling comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Xuance?
faqs.answer: Low priority ban (0.0%). Focus bans on higher-tier Assassin picks unless targeting a one-trick.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Crimson Blur (max Skill 2 first)
